name: Iowa
why_ruby_pro: Iowa ABD compliance for beer and wine distributors out of the box
Iowa Code Chapter 123 excise reporting built into every transaction
Handles Iowa's control-state spirits model alongside open-market beer and wine
problem: Beer and wine licensing tracked separately from spirits control requirements
Chapter 123 excise calculations assembled from disconnected records
Iowa ABD reporting built by hand every quarter
difference: Unified compliance for both ABD-licensed and control-state products
Chapter 123 excise computed automatically per product category
Iowa ABD reports generated from live order data, not manual re-entry
how_it_works: Product catalog flags control vs. open-market items for correct routing
Excise totals roll up per filing period with one-click ABD export
Route analytics show account health across all Iowa territories
